_comment: The autonomy dial. Each stage's mode is one of: 'manual' (you do it yourself), 'approve' (agent produces the artifact, pipeline pauses for your y/n), or 'auto' (agent runs, pipeline continues without asking). Session 1 only wires up 'parse' — later sessions add spec/implement/review/test, and QA + deploy stay hard gates that are never configurable to auto.
